cases.passage: Amit and his wife, Priya, decided to start a small business in their hometown. They had a passion for baking and had been running a small bakery from their home for a few years. After saving enough money, they took a small loan from the local bank and rented a small shop in the town's market. They named their bakery 'Sweet Delights' and started baking a variety of cakes, pastries, and bread. They worked hard to maintain quality and provide excellent customer service. Their business grew rapidly, and they were soon able to repay the loan and start earning a steady income. Amit and Priya's success with 'Sweet Delights' inspired many young entrepreneurs in their town to start their own small businesses.

questions.q: Why did Amit and Priya decide to start a small business?
opts: (B) To pursue their passion for baking
questions.explanation: Amit and Priya decided to start a small business to pursue their passion for baking.

questions.q: Where did Amit and Priya rent a shop for their bakery?
questions.explanation: Amit and Priya rented a small shop in the town's market for their bakery.

questions.q: What was the name of Amit and Priya's bakery?
questions.explanation: Amit and Priya named their bakery 'Sweet Delights'.

questions.q: How did Amit and Priya's business grow?
opts: (B) Rapidly and they were soon able to repay the loan
questions.explanation: Amit and Priya's business grew rapidly, and they were soon able to repay the loan and start earning a steady income.

questions.q: What did Amit and Priya's success inspire in their town?
opts: (A) Many young entrepreneurs to start their own large businesses
(B) Many young entrepreneurs to start their own small businesses
(C) No one to start their own business
(D) Many people to start their own bakeries
questions.explanation: Amit and Priya's success with 'Sweet Delights' inspired many young entrepreneurs in their town to start their own small businesses.

cases.passage: Rahul had been running a small tailoring shop in his neighborhood for a few years. He was known for his quality work and reasonable prices. One day, he received an order from a local school to make uniforms for their students. Rahul was excited about the opportunity and worked hard to complete the order within the given deadline. He not only met the deadline but also provided excellent customer service, which impressed the school authorities. As a result, the school ordered uniforms from Rahul for the next three years, providing him with a steady income. Rahul's success with the school order encouraged him to expand his business and hire more employees.

questions.q: Why was Rahul excited about the order from the local school?
opts: (A) Because it was a new opportunity
(B) Because he could increase his prices
(C) Because he could decrease his prices
(D) Because it was a small order
questions.explanation: Rahul was excited about the opportunity to make uniforms for the school's students.

questions.q: What did Rahul do to complete the order within the given deadline?
opts: (A) He worked hard and completed the order on time
(B) He took a break and completed the order later
(C) He hired more employees to help him complete the order
(D) He increased his prices and completed the order later
questions.explanation: Rahul worked hard to complete the order within the given deadline.

questions.q: What did Rahul's customer service impress the school authorities?
opts: (D) His ability to complete the order on time
questions.explanation: Rahul's excellent customer service impressed the school authorities.

questions.q: What happened to Rahul's business as a result of the school order?
opts: (A) It declined due to increased competition
(C) It expanded and he was able to hire more employees
questions.explanation: Rahul's success with the school order encouraged him to expand his business and hire more employees.

questions.q: For how many years did the school order uniforms from Rahul?
questions.explanation: The school ordered uniforms from Rahul for the next three years.
